nasb.text: Damascus has become helpless; She has turned away to flee, And panic has gripped her; Distress and pangs have taken hold of her Like a woman in childbirth.

esv.text: Damascus has become feeble, she turned to flee, and panic seized her; anguish and sorrows have taken hold of her, as of a woman in labor.

cnv.text: 大馬士革失去勇氣，轉身逃跑； 但恐慌抓住它， 憂慮痛苦把它捉住， 像正在生產的婦人的痛苦一樣。

ccb.text: 大马士革丧失勇气，转身逃命。 她像分娩的妇人一样惊恐不安， 充满痛苦和忧愁。
